title: Hide boardname in Dashboard Timeline widget
excerpt:
When grouping elements by their boards in the timeline widget, the name of the board is shown on both sides - as a group name and for each element. 
  
I wish it was possible to hide the board name for the milestones. Ca…

posts.author: IzzyLu (Isabell Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
When grouping elements by their boards in the timeline widget, the name of the board is shown on both sides - as a group name and for each element.

image662×388 26.2 KB

I wish it was possible to hide the board name for the milestones. Can you please add this option in the settings.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Isabell! Welcome to the community! Have you tried using a Gantt Chart widget instead? That has the option to change the ‘label by’ setting which you can change to Group :). Great suggestion still!

posts.author: IzzyLu (Isabell Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bruce, thanks for your suggestion!
Yes, I was trying to use the Gantt chart. The request was to have multiple timelines & milestones on one line for a better overview. If you have another idea for that, I would be glad to hear about it.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Kind of like this?

image636×176 23.6 KB

Couldn’t find any template on workcanvas (a fairly new monday product), but maybe you could adjust the 2 way synced Gantt charts on there. Alternatively there are multiple reporting/charting apps as well that may have this chart.

posts.author: lmccloskey (Lindsey)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you figured out how to remove the board name from the gantt widget?
